title: Major Venue Revamp Underway for BWF World Championships in Delhi
indian_angle: India is preparing to host the prestigious BWF World Championships in Delhi, with significant venue upgrades to ensure a world-class event.
summary: The venue for the upcoming BWF World Championships in Delhi is undergoing major renovations to address past issues like stray animals and improve facilities, ensuring a smooth tournament.

title: PV Sindhu Defeats World No 4 Chen Yufei in Japan Open
indian_angle: PV Sindhu, India's top women's singles player, secured a crucial victory against a top-ranked opponent at the Japan Open.
summary: PV Sindhu advanced in the Japan Open by defeating World No 4 Chen Yufei, a significant win for the Indian shuttler.

title: Gopichand: PV Sindhu a 'Definite Threat' for World Championships, LA 2028
indian_angle: National coach Pullela Gopichand expresses strong confidence in PV Sindhu's potential to perform exceptionally at major upcoming global tournaments.
summary: Pullela Gopichand believes PV Sindhu is a formidable contender for both the upcoming World Championships and the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Falters at Final Step in US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing strong form before a narrow loss.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open concluded with a defeat in the final against Su Li Yang.

title: 3x15 Scoring System Implemented in Domestic Ranking Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring system will be adopted across all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships in India, impacting junior categories.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has implemented a 3x15 scoring system for all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships for U-13, U-15, and U-17 age groups.
